occupation: Chief Operating Financial Officer at DoohClick AB
headline: Chief Operating Officer @ DoohClick
summary:
I have a passion for betterment, personally and professionally. I especially love creative & data driven decision making to translate ideas and theories into actionable plans and tangible results. 

I care about driving value, and I always look for ways to increase that value, and view every challenge with an analytical eye and a ‘can do’ attitude. I suppose that is a nice way of saying I am extremely competitive against myself, challenging myself to do better.

These are the core principles of myself when driving strategic initiatives, co-operating with clients, and leading those I am responsible for. 

So far I have successfully applied myself at a global and senior leadership level in TMT, Automotive, FMCG, and Travel industries. I have grown my career experience in these industries from a Strategy Consulting and Change Management Consulting role, and as a Director with strategic operations responsibility.

Gallup Strengthsfinder: Restorative, Strategic, Individualisation, Command, Ideation  
Myers-Briggs: ENTJ - A

The end result is a well oiled team who are familiar with one another and our working styles, with various competition wins under our belt. - Now facing inquires from SMEs for short contract consulting work.

accomplishment_projects.title: DMS. The Dance Music Society (University of Surrey)
accomplishment_projects.description: Designed and initiated the society as a new business start-up, a self sustainable event management organisation which is still very successful. The society’s structure took a standard business structure, with clear responsibilities across all functions (Marketing, Finance, Operations). • Producing a robust business plan, defining key milestones in-line with the strategic plan and implementing the core business functions, recruiting in voluntary staff to perform core duties. • Participating in voluntary projects and fundraisers – generating funds to keep the initiatives functioning. • On point of departure the society activities (events, workshops) had generated £20k in revenue for the society and more than £40k for the Student’s Union funding. • DMS played an integral part of UK-wide awarded amenities like GU2 Radio and StagTV and was awarded ‘Most Improved Society’ of the year 2010 and “Arts Society’ of the year 2011.

volunteer_work.title: Board Member
volunteer_work.description: Board Member for my building association, with a focus on sustainable and efficient development of the Association's financial strategy. Our mission is to provide an accommodating and attractive environment in central Uppsala where our residents can live happily and grow their property investment. We have been trusted by them to manage our building with due care for the environment, our quality of life, and our financial investment.

recommendations:
Marika Eriksson

Tim was my team manager up until recently. He is driven and straight forward. His dedication to improve motivates people to follow him and reach success. He’s a true leader with excellent interpersonal skills. His natural way to balance being personal and professional makes people have confidence in him and invites an honest communication. One of Tim’s best qualities is that he gets things done. By seizing opportunities on behalf of the team and the organisation we experienced great improvements on personal and organisational levels. He doesn’t refrain from questioning processes; he acknowledges the problem, gathers the relevant data, puts people into action and makes it happen. For that he has earned my respect. 
With his organisational skills, he has the situation under control. It’s intriguing to see the structured schedule and priority plan. 
Tim has a great personality and I’m happy to have gotten to know him; always radiating happiness and making sure you have a good time.

LinkedIn User

Min sammanfattande bild av Tim efter ett tajt samarbete är att han är analytisk och mycket stark på en strategisk nivå. En strukturerad och pedagogisk person som drivs av processer och trivs med utmanande problem och som verkligen bidrar med positiv energi till sin omgivning! En av Tims främsta styrkor är förmågan att förutse risker samt att identifiera ineffektivitet och problem och att lösa och optimera dessa. Han har en otrolig förmåga att sammanfatta och förklara komplexa problem på ett enkelt och tydligt sätt till människor oavsett om det är på styrelse eller verksamhetsnivå. Tim är en person med positiv utstrålning som har nära till skratt och är lätt att kommunicera och ha att göra med. En superkraft Tim har är onekligen hans skicklighet att entusiasmera andra, speciellt när han håller presentationer och äger rummet med hans energi, pondus och otroliga vokabulär. Tim är lojal och hårt arbetande med en stark förmåga att snabbt anpassa sig till nya arbetsförhållanden som lyckats skapa stabilitet i teamet i tider av förändring och tvära kast. Jag rekommenderar dig som har en tydlig bild av vad du vill uppnå men behöver hjälp med att säkerställa en skalbar och optimerad väg till målet, att arbeta med Tim om du får chansen!
